message:
feat(shell): add session with PTY, TERM support, and root-aware tests

Session manages a PTY-based shell session using login -f:
- ValidateUser checks user exists before spawning
- NewSession creates PTY with initial size and TERM env
- Resize handles terminal resize events (thread-safe)
- Close cleans up PTY and process properly

Tests that require root (login -f) skip on non-root.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
